title: lithocarpus melataiensis
intro: Lithocarpus melataiensis, also known as the Melatae Lithocarpus, is a species of plant in the beech family, Fagaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus melataiensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
